have h1 : {n | φ n > φ (n - φ n)}.HasDensity 1 := erdos_1064
  have h2 : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, φ n > φ (n - φ n) := h1.hasDensityOne_iff_eventually.mpr (by norm_num)
  have h3 : ∀ᶠ n in atTop, f n < φ n - φ (n - φ n) := by
    filter_upwards [h2, hf.tendsto] with n hn hfn
    have : (f n : ℝ) < (φ n - φ (n - φ n) : ℝ) := by
      have : (φ n : ℝ) - (φ (n - φ n) : ℝ) > 0 := by exact_mod_cast hn
      have : (f n : ℝ) / (n : ℝ) < 1 := by
        apply lt_of_tendsto_zero (by simp_all) (by norm_num)
      calc
        (f n : ℝ) = (f n : ℝ) / (n : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) := by field_simp
        _ < 1 * (n : ℝ) := by gcongr
        _ = (n : ℝ) := by norm_num
        _ ≤ (φ n : ℝ) := by
          apply Nat.cast_le.mpr
          apply Nat.totient_le
        _ - (φ (n - φ n) : ℝ) + (φ (n - φ n) : ℝ) := by ring
        _ = (φ n : ℝ) := by ring
      linarith
    exact_mod_cast this
  exact Set.HasDensity.hasDensityOne_iff_eventually.mpr h3
